title: Bamboo Wooden Round Tray 30cm Large Platter for Tea Coffee Food Home Decoration - Lap Serving Tray for Eating - Decorative Wooden Plate Serving Board
features: ✅ DIMENSIONS: Width 30cm × Depth 30cm × Height 2cm, Large round serving tray
✅ NATURAL MATERIAL: this non slip tray is made of nature bamboo wood material, eco-friendly and sustainable, durable and decay resistant

✅ VERSATILE and LIGHTWEIGHT: this round wood serving tray can be used as a tray for eating, breakfast tray, dinner tray, fruit tray or drinks tray in bars or parties, it can also be used as dinner plate, such as sushi plate, fruit plate or cheese plate.
✅ EASY TO CLEAN AND STORE: you can simply stack the round trays to save up space. Simply wipe off any dirt. The tough tray is hand washable as well

✅ ELEGANT DESIGN: this bamboo plate is perfect for any style of home decor. It will be a great complement for your dinner set or vintage tea set. Perfect for every occasion: Valentine day, wedding or dating anniversary, Christmas, birthday celebration parties
description: Product Description Ecowonder Wooden Round Tray – Large Serving Plate Crafted from sustainable high-quality bamboo wood, this beautiful round tray is stylish and characteristic, making it the perfect addition to your home and venue. Stylish & Functional Serving Tray - Perfect for All Occasions The 30cm wooden tray is great for serving cakes, bread, snacks, finger food, sandwiches, cheese, burgers, appetizers, fruits, and sweets to woo your guests. This serving platter tray can be applied on every occasion: Valentine Day, wedding or dating anniversary, Christmas, birthday celebration parties to demonstrate your style and taste. With its thoughtful design of raised side edges, the round wooden tray can also be used to organise jewelleries, candles, shells, dried botanicals, prized collectibles, etc. Its elegant and sophisticated appearance can fit any corner of your home as a decorative piece. Premium Material This large round tray is made from high quality natural bamboo wood, which is very durable, dateless and sustainable. Growing at an impressive rate of up to 3.5 feet per day, bamboo is truly a sustainable resource. Bamboo can be harvested in 3-4 years. Hardwoods like oak take 60 years to restore. Almost 1 million acres of forests are lost each week worldwide to deforestation. Bamboo’s versatility as a substitute for hardwoods offers a chance to dramatically reduce that figure and protect the forest resources. Bamboo has the characteristics of moisture absorption and corrosion resistance, so it is suitable for use as serving board, tea tray, plate/bowl, bathroom stands, kitchen racks and utensils. Bamboo kitchenware are also thought to be safer and more hygienic than wooden ones because bamboo does not absorb liquids easily and it has mild natural antimicrobial properties. Bamboo houseware is easy to clean and maintain. Generally, bamboo houseware doesn’t require a lot of maintenance to retain their functionality and beautiful appearance. Do not use chemical cleaning agents to clean food stains from bamboo. To remove stains from brightly coloured foods, use coarse salt or baking soda. After cleaning with a dry or slightly damp cloth, you will see its natural shine even without applying polish.
